title: MCP API Design
text: MCP resource servers validate scoped tokens instead of receiving token passthrough from an agent.

title: Agent Identity Architecture
text: Agent calls are bound to a human principal, an agent id, a requested tool, and a least-privilege authorization check.

title: Auth0Lab Roadmap
text: Roadmap work includes token vault patterns, async human approval, MCP authorization, and A2A identity flows.

title: Finance Payroll Runbook
text: Payroll workflows require finance folder access and cannot be used as retrieval context for engineering-only users.
